description_long: This bird has a streamlined, slender body with a smooth, light brownish-tan plumage covering most of its form. The wings are neatly folded along the sides, showing a subtle gradient from tan to darker grayish-brown towards the tips. Its head is rounded with a small, dark eye and a short, thin, slightly curved beak. The tail is long and tapers to a point, with a faintly lighter patch near the tip. The legs are not visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The overall appearance is sleek and uniform, with minimal patterning and a soft, matte finish to the feathers.
description: A slender, light brown bird with a pointed tail and smooth, uniform plumage. It has a small, slightly curved beak and folded wings with subtle color gradients.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, smooth tan plumage, and pointed tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the narrow, tapering tail and the symmetrical alignment of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the bird's streamlined profile and subtle feather shading.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, small beak, and the bird's overall slenderness.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with subtle gradient from tan to gray on wings and tail
